title: AN ACT CHANCING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAN MAGRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARCOS, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARRIO SANTIAGO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 17119 / 65 OG No. 26, 6585 (June 30, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5408, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANCING THE NAME OF BARRIO SAN MAGRO IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MARCOS, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS NORTE, TO BARRIO SANTIAGO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio San Magro in the Municipality of Marcos, Province of Ilocos Norte, is hereby changed to Barrio Santiago.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
